title: Additional labels for Projekt Health (RAG) needed!!!

posts.author: ROCKster (Marc-Oliver Kaul)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community and monday-dev-team,
in our company, we are currently facing the problem that no labels can be added to the project health column.
Some project frameworks also allow the values “future” (not started) and “completed” as project health options.
We want to add these to the portfolio as options within our use case for the portfolio feature.
However, as the column is not configurable, there is no option to remain in the standard system.
would therefore like to make an urgent request that either the options mentioned are added or, ideally, the column for configurations is opened.
I am grateful for your opinions and look forward to your feedback.
